title: [codereview-pass1] Gateway struct uses bare Node instead of RplNode for root; no DAO handling
description: Gateway.new uses Node but as border router must be root with full RPL state to process DAOs and populate routes. handle_frame_rpl is the entrypoint for DaoReceived events. P2 architecture. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Gateway struct now uses private RplNode (was bare Node); added process_rpl wrapper for root/DAO via handle_frame_rpl + RplEvent; updated forwarding, constants usage, lib reexports; 3 clean clippy/test passes with no new codereview beads filed after fixes. All prior findings resolved.
